title: WPShadow
message: Central hub for site health monitoring, analysis tools, and optimization features.

title: WPShadow Dashboard
message: View your site health status, recent findings, and quick improvement recommendations.

title: Workflow Manager
message: Create and manage automated workflows to standardize site maintenance tasks.

title: WPShadow Tools
message: Access specialized analysis tools including accessibility audits, link checks, and color contrast analysis.

title: Help & Guidance
message: Learn tips, configure tooltips, and access helpful resources for your site.

title: Dashboard home
message: Visit the Dashboard for health, updates, and a high-level view of your site.

title: Updates
message: Check and install updates for WordPress, plugins, and themes to keep your site secure and running smoothly.

title: Blog posts
message: Manage your blog posts, or add a new one.

title: All Posts
message: See all your published and draft posts in a list.

title: Add a new post
message: Create and publish a new blog post.

title: Organize posts
message: Create and manage categories to organize your posts.

title: Add tags
message: Use tags to label your posts for better discovery.

title: Media
message: Upload and manage images, videos, and files for your site.

title: Library
message: View and manage all your uploaded images, videos, and media files.

title: Add New
message: Upload new images, videos, or files to your media library.

title: Pages
message: Create and manage static pages like Home, About, and Contact.

title: All Pages
message: See all your published and draft pages.

title: Create new page
message: Add a new static page to your site.

title: Comments
message: Moderate, approve, and respond to comments from your visitors.

title: Site design
message: Customize your site appearance with themes, colors, menus, and widgets.

title: Choose a theme
message: Browse and activate themes to change your site layout and style.

title: Live customizer
message: Preview changes to colors, fonts, and layout in real-time before publishing.

title: Edit menus
message: Create and organize navigation menus for your site.

title: Manage widgets
message: Add and arrange widgets in your site sidebar and other areas.

title: Extend functionality
message: Browse, install, and manage plugins to add features to your site.

title: Installed plugins
message: See all your installed plugins, activate, deactivate, or delete them.

title: Add new plugins
message: Search and install plugins from the WordPress plugin directory.

title: Manage team
message: Add users and manage their roles to control site access.

title: All users
message: View, edit, or remove user accounts from your site.

title: Invite user
message: Add a new user to your site with a specific role.

title: Your profile
message: Update your personal information, password, and settings.

title: Site tools
message: Access tools for importing, exporting, and analyzing your site.

title: Available tools
message: Browse available tools for site maintenance and optimization.

title: Import content
message: Import posts, pages, and other content from another site.

title: Export content
message: Back up your posts, pages, and other content as an XML file.

title: Site health
message: Check your site status and get recommendations for improvements.

title: Site settings
message: Configure your site name, timezone, and other important settings.

title: General settings
message: Set site title, tagline, timezone, and date format.

title: Writing settings
message: Configure default post format, category, and post settings.

title: Reading settings
message: Set your homepage and how many posts to display.

title: Comments settings
message: Control comment moderation, notifications, and avatar settings.

title: Image settings
message: Configure automatic image sizes and thumbnail settings.

title: Permalink structure
message: Set how your post URLs are formatted for better SEO.

title: Privacy settings
message: Configure your site privacy and search engine visibility.

title: Quick add
message: Quickly create posts, pages, or upload media from anywhere in admin.

title: Updates available
message: Install WordPress, plugin, and theme updates to stay secure.

title: Publish
message: Click to publish your post. You can edit it anytime after publishing.

title: Your profile
message: Access your account settings, edit your profile, or log out.

title: Edit profile
message: Update your personal information, email, and password.

title: Log out
message: End your session and log out from the WordPress admin.

title: Site name
message: Visit your site home page or access site-level settings.

title: Toggle menu
message: Collapse or expand the sidebar menu for more screen space.

title: Screen options
message: Customize what columns and items appear on this page.

title: Get help
message: Learn more about this WordPress admin page and its features.

title: Search admin
message: Quickly search for posts, pages, settings, and more from anywhere in the admin.

title: Content settings
message: Adjust post settings like categories, tags, featured image, and more.

title: Save draft
message: Save your work without publishing. You can finish editing later.

title: Preview
message: See how your post or page will look before publishing.

title: Bulk actions
message: Select an action and check boxes above to perform the same action on multiple items.

title: Edit item
message: Open this item for editing.

title: Delete item
message: Permanently remove this item. This action cannot be undone.

title: Edit code
message: Edit plugin or theme files directly. Be careful—errors can break your site.

title: Activate plugin
message: Turn on this plugin to enable its features on your site.

title: Deactivate plugin
message: Turn off this plugin. Its features will no longer be available.

title: Activate theme
message: Set this as your active theme and apply it to your site.

title: Live preview
message: Preview changes to this theme in real-time before applying.

title: Save changes
message: Submit this form and save your changes.

title: Cancel
message: Go back without saving changes.

title: Featured image
message: Set or change the main image for this post.

title: Page template
message: Choose a custom layout template for this page if available.

title: Edit URL
message: Change the web address (URL) of this post or page.

title: Categories
message: Organize this post by selecting one or more categories.

title: Add tags
message: Add keywords to help readers find and understand this post.

title: Site title
message: The name of your website, displayed in browser tabs and search results.

title: Site tagline
message: A short description of your site. Leave blank if you don't want one.

title: Site URL
message: The URL where your site is located. Changing this requires careful attention.

title: Home URL
message: The main page of your site. Usually the same as your Site URL.

title: Admin email
message: All notifications and site updates are sent to this email address.

title: Membership
message: Allow new users to register and create accounts on your site.

title: Allow registrations
message: When checked, visitors can create user accounts. When unchecked, only administrators can create users.

title: New User Default Role
message: The permission level automatically assigned to newly registered users. Choose Subscriber for read-only access.

title: Timezone
message: Select your timezone. This affects when scheduled posts are published and when cron jobs run.

title: Date format
message: Choose how dates appear throughout your site. Select a preset format or create a custom one using PHP date codes.

title: Time format
message: Choose how times appear throughout your site. Select 12-hour, 24-hour, or create a custom format.

title: Week starts on
message: Set which day the week starts on in post calendars and scheduling interfaces. Affects calendar display only.

title: Site Language
message: Select the language for the WordPress admin interface and site. Change requires language packs to be installed.

title: General Settings
message: Configure your site's basic information: title, URL, timezone, and language. These are core settings that affect your entire site.

title: Default post category
message: Posts are automatically assigned to this category if none is selected.

title: Default post format
message: Choose the default format for new posts (Standard, Aside, Gallery, etc).

title: Post via email
message: Allow posting new content by sending emails to a special address.

title: Homepage displays
message: Choose to show your latest posts or a static page as the homepage.

title: Homepage
message: Select the page to display as your site homepage.

title: Posts page
message: Select the page to display your blog posts list.

title: Posts per page
message: Number of posts to display on each page of your blog.

title: RSS posts
message: Number of posts to include in your RSS feed.

title: RSS content
message: Choose whether to show full post or excerpt in RSS feeds.

title: Allow comments
message: Allow visitors to post comments on new posts by default.

title: Allow pingbacks
message: Allow other sites to notify you when they link to your content.

title: Comment moderation
message: Hold comments for review before they appear on your site.

title: Hold for review
message: Hold comments for moderation if they contain more than this many links.

title: Comment blocklist
message: Comments containing any of these words will be marked as spam or blocked.

title: Notify on comments
message: Send email when someone posts a new comment.

title: Notify on moderation
message: Send email when a comment is held for moderation.

title: Require name and email
message: Commenters must provide a name and email address.

title: Enable nesting
message: Allow replies to specific comments to be nested under them.

title: Nesting levels
message: How many levels deep comments can be nested.

title: Show avatars
message: Display user profile images next to their comments and posts.

title: Avatar rating
message: Choose the maximum content rating for displayed avatars.

title: Thumbnail width
message: Width of automatically generated thumbnail images (pixels).

title: Thumbnail height
message: Height of automatically generated thumbnail images (pixels).

title: Crop thumbnails
message: Crop images to exact size or scale and letterbox them.

title: Medium size width
message: Width of medium-sized images (pixels).

title: Medium size height
message: Height of medium-sized images (pixels).

title: Large size width
message: Width of large-sized images (pixels).

title: Large size height
message: Height of large-sized images (pixels).

title: Upload folder
message: Where media files are stored on your server. Default: wp-content/uploads

title: Organize by month/year
message: Organize uploads into folders by year and month.

title: Permalink structure
message: Choose how your post URLs are formatted. Important for SEO.

title: Category prefix
message: The URL prefix for category pages. Default: category

title: Tag prefix
message: The URL prefix for tag pages. Default: tag

title: Site visibility
message: Control whether search engines can index your site.

title: Privacy policy
message: Select the page to use as your privacy policy.

title: First name
message: Your first name (optional, displayed in some areas).

title: Last name
message: Your last name (optional, displayed in some areas).

title: Nickname
message: How your name is displayed publicly.

title: Display name
message: How your name appears when you publish or comment.

title: Email address
message: Your email address for account recovery and notifications.

title: Website
message: Your personal website URL (optional).

title: Biographical info
message: Your bio or about information displayed on author pages.

title: Admin color scheme
message: Choose your preferred color scheme for the admin interface.

title: Keyboard shortcuts
message: Enable keyboard shortcuts for faster navigation.

title: Admin bar
message: Show the WordPress admin bar when viewing the site.

title: Comment shortcuts
message: Enable keyboard shortcuts for comment moderation.

title: Username
message: Your login username (cannot be changed).

title: Password
message: Your login password. Use a strong password with letters, numbers, and symbols.

title: User role
message: The permission level determines what this user can do on the site.

title: Select items
message: Check these to select items for bulk actions.

title: Item title
message: Click to edit the title or view the full item details.

title: Author
message: Click to see all content by this author.

title: Category
message: Click to view all posts in this category.

title: Date
message: The date the item was created or published.

title: Status
message: Shows whether the item is published, draft, or has other status.

title: Search items
message: Type to search for items by title or content.

title: Search
message: Click to search for items matching your keywords.

title: Filter by date
message: Show only items from a specific month or year.

title: Filter by category
message: Show only items in a specific category.

title: Filter by status
message: Show items with a specific status (Published, Draft, Scheduled, etc).

title: Filter
message: Apply the selected filters to update the list.

title: Navigate pages
message: Click to go to a different page of items.

title: Items per page
message: Shows how many items are displayed per page. Adjust in Screen Options.

title: Sort column
message: Click to sort items by this column. Click again to reverse order.

title: Export Personal Data
message: Generate and download a data export file containing all personal information for a user account. Required by GDPR and privacy regulations.

title: Erase Personal Data
message: Remove all personal data associated with a user account, complying with privacy deletion requests and regulations like GDPR.

title: Theme File Editor
message: Edit theme template and CSS files directly. Be careful—errors can break your site. Consider using a child theme instead.

title: Plugin File Editor
message: Edit plugin PHP files directly. Be careful—syntax errors can break your site and disable the plugin.

title: Site/Theme Editor
message: Edit your site design, templates, and styles with a visual editor. Make changes with live preview before publishing.
